info.title: Event Platform API
info.description:
Multi-tenant event platform API.

- **Global routes** (`/api/...`) — authentication and platform (super admin) endpoints.
- **Tenant routes** (`/api/tenant/...`) — resolved via the venue subdomain; every endpoint
  below this prefix is scoped to the authenticated user's venue.

All mutating endpoints follow the `FormRequest → DTO → Service → ApiResource → ApiResponse`
pipeline. **OpenAPI schemas in `app/OpenApi/` are a read-only projection** of that contract —
FormRequest + ApiResource + DTO remain the source of truth; update both in the same commit.

post.summary: Record commission received from an organizer

get.description: Read-only composition endpoint that aggregates platform KPIs, today metrics, top venues/events, latest activity, and critical alerts for the platform admin home screen.

alerts.message: Failed payment verifications in the last 24 hours.

get.description: Read-only platform-wide report for super administrators. Aggregates revenue, commissions, top venues/events, payment methods, and refunds.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start date (applied as start of day).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end date (applied as end of day). Must be on or after `from`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows returned for `top_venues` and `top_events` (default 10, max 100).

get.summary: Get authenticated user in tenant context

get.description: Read-only composition endpoint that aggregates KPIs, today metrics, upcoming events, latest orders, latest check-ins, and commission status for the organizer home screen.
Read-only venue report aggregating sales, revenue, attendance, and commission metrics. Supports optional date range and event filters.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start date (venue timezone applied as start of day).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end date (applied as end of day). Must be on or after `from`.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: Optional event scope within the current venue.

post.summary: Create payment instructions for manual wallet transfer
Verify manual wallet transfer by transaction number

422.description: Validation, duplicate transaction number, or verification failure

post.summary: Check in a ticket by QR token

message.description: Generic API error envelope returned by `ApiExceptionRenderer`.
Validation error envelope returned by Laravel `ValidationException` handler.

payload.description: Visible only to users with orders.manage permission.

sanctum.description: Laravel Sanctum bearer token. Obtain via /api/auth/login or /api/tenant/auth/login.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, tokens, password reset, email verification

tags.name: Commerce
tags.description: Products, product variants, coupons, and promo codes (tenant-scoped)

tags.name: Platform
tags.description: Tax rates (tenant-scoped) and platform settings (global, super admin)
